name: Aurora Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Over-ear Bluetooth 5.3 headphones with adaptive active noise cancellation, 40h battery life, and USB-C fast charging.

name: Aurora Pulse True Wireless Earbuds
description: Compact true-wireless earbuds with IPX5 sweat resistance, spatial audio, and a wireless charging case.

name: BassDrop Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Rugged IP67 waterproof speaker with 360° sound, 24h playtime, and stereo pairing.

name: Nimbus 14 Ultrabook (16GB/512GB)
description: 14-inch 2.8K OLED ultrabook with a 12-core CPU, 16GB RAM, 512GB NVMe SSD, and 18h battery.

name: Nimbus Glide Wireless Ergonomic Mouse
description: Low-latency 2.4GHz + Bluetooth ergonomic mouse with 8 programmable buttons and silent clicks.

name: Nimbus Tactile Mechanical Keyboard 75%
description: Hot-swappable 75% mechanical keyboard with tactile brown switches, gasket mount, and RGB backlight.

name: ClearView 27" 4K USB-C Monitor
description: 27-inch 4K IPS monitor with 90W USB-C power delivery, 99% sRGB, and a height-adjustable stand.

name: Pulse Fit Smartwatch GPS
description: Fitness smartwatch with built-in GPS, heart-rate and SpO2 sensors, AMOLED display, and 7-day battery.

name: Pulse Fit Activity Band 3
description: Slim activity tracker with sleep tracking, 14-day battery, and 5ATM water resistance.

name: BrewMaster Drip Coffee Maker 12-Cup
description: Programmable 12-cup drip coffee maker with thermal carafe, bloom mode, and auto shut-off.

name: VortexBlend High-Speed Blender
description: 1500W high-speed blender with a 2L BPA-free jug, 6 preset programs, and pulse control.

name: Lumen Smart LED Desk Lamp
description: Dimmable smart desk lamp with adjustable color temperature, USB charging port, and app control.

name: Apex Pro Wireless Game Controller
description: Low-latency wireless controller with hall-effect joysticks, back paddles, and 30h battery.

name: Apex Ergonomic Gaming Chair
description: Adjustable gaming chair with 4D armrests, lumbar support, and a reclining backrest up to 160°.

name: TrailFlow Insulated Water Bottle 1L
description: Double-wall vacuum-insulated stainless steel bottle that keeps drinks cold 24h / hot 12h.

name: ZenGrip Non-Slip Yoga Mat
description: 6mm eco-friendly TPE yoga mat with alignment lines, non-slip texture, and a carry strap.

name: ErgoForm Mesh Office Chair
description: Breathable mesh office chair with adjustable lumbar support, 3D armrests, and synchro-tilt.

name: ErgoForm Electric Standing Desk 120cm
description: Dual-motor electric sit-stand desk with 4 memory presets, anti-collision, and a 120x60cm top.
